message:
fix(conformance): reject sidecars with envelope/packet count mismatches

Add cross-validation of envelope.raptorq.k vs source_packets and
envelope.raptorq.repair_symbols vs repair_packets in sidecar integrity
verification. Previously a sidecar could pass integrity checks even when
its envelope metadata contradicted its own packet counts. Add two
targeted regression tests for both mismatch scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
